allow: Bash(cd /Users/p.magana/Documents/projects/sesamecheck/com.pablo-magaa.sesamecheck.sdPlugin && for f in imgs/plugin/marketplace.png imgs/plugin/category-icon.png imgs/plugin/category-icon@2x.png imgs/actions/counter/icon.png imgs/actions/counter/key.png imgs/actions/worktimer/icon.png imgs/actions/worktimer/key.png imgs/actions/checkin/icon.png imgs/actions/checkin/key.png imgs/actions/checkout/icon.png imgs/actions/checkout/key.png imgs/actions/pause/icon.png imgs/actions/pause/key.png; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then sips -g pixelWidth -g pixelHeight "$f" 2>/dev/null | tail -2 | tr '\\n' ' '; echo "  $f"; else echo "MISSING: $f"; fi; done)
